notes: Side-effecting skill: writes real CRM deals + Drive folders/docs. Baseline (no-skill) runs are intentionally omitted because they would create duplicate/garbage production records. Tested via a real live run + an idempotency re-run. Live window is widened to ~30d in the prompt because the 7d window is currently empty.

evals.name: live-month-intake
evals.prompt: Can you process the AI 顧問服務 consult inbounds from the past month? Log anything new into the CRM and set up the project folders.
evals.expected_output: Finds the discovery-call inquiries from website@zynkr.ai in the last ~30 days. Creates a CRM deal named 'Jane（轉職計劃中）AI 顧問' (stage=new, owner=Peter, pipeline=銷售流程, service_tier=advisory), a Drive folder '[1] 轉職計劃中（Jane）' under parent 1hkXPX7O…, and a kickoff Google Doc inside it pre-filled with Jane's name/email/company/context. Skips the 'GA4 Test' row as a test. Ends with a summary table listing both (Jane=created, GA4 Test=skipped).
assertions: Found the consult inbounds via Gmail and identified both inquiries (Jane + GA4 Test)
Created a CRM deal named exactly 'Jane（轉職計劃中）AI 顧問'
Deal fields correct: stage=new, owner=Peter Tu, pipeline=銷售流程, service_tier=advisory, priority=medium, lead_source=content, close_date=today+30
Find-or-created the contact and company and linked them to the deal
Logged exactly one 'created' activity for the deal
Created Drive folder '[1] 轉職計劃中（Jane）' under the consult parent folder
Created an editable Google Doc kickoff inside the folder, pre-filled with Jane's details
Appended the project folder URL back to the deal notes
Skipped the GA4 Test row as a test (no deal created for it)
Reported a clear summary table listing both leads and their outcomes

evals.name: idempotency-rerun
evals.prompt: 處理一下本月的顧問諮詢，有新的就建立 deal 跟資料夾。
evals.expected_output: Run immediately after eval 0. Jane now has a deal, so she is de-duped (skipped). GA4 Test is skipped as a test row. No new deal, folder, or doc is created. Report says no new leads this period and lists why each was skipped. Critically: does NOT create a duplicate Jane deal or an orphan numbered folder.
assertions: Found the 2 inquiries again on re-run
Skipped Jane because a deal already exists for her email (dedup by email)
Skipped GA4 Test as a test row
Created 0 new deals — no duplicate Jane deal (DB count stays 1)
Created 0 new folders/docs — no orphan numbered folder
Reported that nothing new was created, with per-lead skip reasons
